rule Windows_Ransomware_Nightsky_a7f19411 { meta: author = "Elastic Security" id = "a7f19411-4c28-4cc7-b60c-ef51cb10b905" fingerprint = "0f2aac3a538a921b78f7c2521adf65678830abab8ec8b360ac3dddae5fbc4756" creation_date = "2022-01-11" last_modified = "2022-04-12" threat_name = "Windows.Ransomware.Nightsky" reference_sample = "1fca1cd04992e0fcaa714d9dfa97323d81d7e3d43a024ec37d1c7a2767a17577" severity = 90 arch_context = "x86, arm64" scan_context = "file, memory" license = "Elastic License v2" os = "windows" strings: $a1 = "\\NightSkyReadMe.hta" wide fullword $a2 = ".nightsky" wide fullword $a3 = "

NIGHT SKY
" ascii fullword $a4 = "URL:https://contact.nightsky.cyou" ascii fullword condition: 2 of them }
